content: We can frame the original Self-Refine framework as a single-perspective iterative self-improvement mechanism, and integrate multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into each iteration of Self-Refine to break the framework's tendency to get stuck in local output optima. This modified framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision data, while leveraging the perspective diversity of modern self-reflection mechanisms to generate higher-quality outputs across code generation, reasoning and creative writing tasks.
